title: Luma key sweep on decoded media

metricComparisons.description: engaging the luma key should drop output mean luma as dark pixels become transparent against black
engaging the noise gate should drop rendered level on dim/quiet segments

expectedVideo: amount=1 should soft-key out the darker regions of the fixture and leave bright regions intact
expectedAudio: amount=1 should pull rendered level down by attenuating low-amplitude content via the noise gate
manualChecks: Does the soft-knee width feel musical for both image and audio?
At amount=1 with default threshold=0.5, does the gated audio still have a usable signal or is it stripped to silence?
Threshold/tolerance sliders move the key plausibly in both domains?
